form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.42) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and four places from 10 starts. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 300m at this track in a handy 16.80 beating Go Gracie Go. Looks well placed to make it three straight.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (16.85) in a Grade 5, finishing a 0.8 lengths third. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Tough line-up and may struggle.
